full_text:
Hu Yuan (Shiyuan) 胡淵 (世元)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Yuan (胡淵), styledShiyuan (世元). Son of Hu Lie, his army killed Zhong Hui and defeated Jiang Wei’s revolt. Hu Yuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
